title: HorizonSky
description: A realistic cloud-filled sky overlay with soft lighting and a smooth horizon atmosphere.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c181b9ab85c51abb87ad3c81d2b943dc39a2aeea.jpeg)

**HorizonSky** is a bright and natural sky overlay focused on realism and calm vibes.
It features volumetric-style clouds and a smooth horizon blend that creates a peaceful daytime ambiance.

Designed to layer over the default sky, it enhances immersion without modifying blocks or items, ensuring full compatibility with nearly any texture pack.

### 🌌 Features

- Custom space sky
- Mars as the main celestial body
- Earth visible in the background
- Designed to stay readable during gameplay

### Requirements

- Needs OptiFine
- Custom Sky: ON
- Stars: ON
- Sun & Moon: ON
